title: Ember Shader
description: Ember Shader adds Shadows to Minecraft! In the future it should run on any computer but it is still in early development, so do not expect much.
body:
# Ember Shader
**Ember Shader is still in development!**
In the future it should be a good looking Shader which should run on any computer without great performance impact.

## What does Ember Shader have?
Currently Ember Shader does not have much.
The newest Version has Shadows and Settings for Shadows and overall Brightness.

![Settings of Ember Shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c81c33540f9f6e0cd034cc6c84be179a501fc65b.webp)

This is just like a Devlog right now.

Help me develop the Shader by posting Bugs and Performance issues in the Discord Channel "Bugs"

I'm really sorry but it takes longer than expected to make an update.
Sadly I lost the files after corrupting my OS and I'm doing something else right now.
